# Python-Monsters licensed graphics source

- Repository: https://github.com/clear-code-projects/Python-Monsters
- Pinned commit: `1b15724635ef11e84dd719c6c30240c053348d82`
- Pinned `graphics` Git tree: `044bc7916305e89fb0e602b6ea82f42e931871ec`
- Retrieved archive SHA-256: `a076076288974870e22fe8174ee81e8d3175a25c10ce38baa17fc5e383327aed`
- Inventory: 140 unmodified files under `graphics/**`, recorded in `SHA256SUMS`; inventory SHA-256 `fe827e41fac55839822ca4ba35b503962ce43bbb2c5b696b3adb0034f57d023f`
- Excluded: all upstream `audio/**`, source code, maps, names, lore, and gameplay data

## Artwork attribution

`graphics/**` artwork is by Scarloxy, published as **Monster Pack With Sprites Pixel Art**:
https://scarloxy.itch.io/mpwsp01

License: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0):
https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Change notice: GameIt copied the pinned upstream graphics files without modifying their bytes. The runtime selects, frames, scales, and may tint representative files for display. GameIt does not reuse the reference project's names, lore, or gameplay data.

## Font notices

- `graphics/fonts/PixeloidSans.ttf`: Pixeloid Sans v0.4, © 2020-2022 GGBotNet, SIL OFL 1.1. SHA-256 `9afa72c564fd027e826b23375847a25f17fc8e214dd52d10c9fcf3d173e252e9`. Official source: https://ggbot.itch.io/pixeloid-font
